name: Busty and depressed ghost girl.
description:
A petite, busty, lonely, depressed ghost in a school abandoned years ago.

Extra NSFW image

Hi! If you're a JLLM user, I recommend setting the temperature to 0.5. the prompt... I'll leave that up to you. Using a proxy is recommended; GLM 5.1, Deep Seek V4 Flash/Pro and Kimi 2.6, gave me good results. I haven't tested much else, so... that's all. Enjoy!

Any recommendations or complaints? Leave them in the comments.
